name: ELYZA
description: Tokyo LLM lab specializing in Japanese-language generative AI; Llama-3.1-ELYZA-JP-70B used by Japans Digital Agency.

seo.title: ELYZA — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: ELYZA: Tokyo LLM lab specializing in Japanese-language generative AI; Llama-3.1-ELYZA-JP-70B used by Japans Digital Agency.

when_to_use: Deploying Japanese-language LLMs tuned for business tasks
Building Japanese document summarization and Q&A pipelines
Fine-tuning ELYZA models on proprietary Japanese corpora
Accessing state-of-the-art Japanese text generation via API

pros: Japan's Digital Agency uses their model
cons: Limited hosted API vs global providers
Smaller team than Alibaba or ByteDance labs
review.verdict: The Japanese-language LLM when accuracy in Japanese matters more than global breadth.
review.best_for: Japanese government, enterprise, and startup teams needing top Japanese LLM
review.not_for: Global products where GPT-4 or Claude multilingual suffices

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
